message.content:
@startuml
title Scheduled Events

actor "Recording Staff" as rs
actor "Coach" as coach
package "IP/Mobile Cams" as cams
package "Consumer Apps" as apps
package "Security Gateway" as sg
package "Streaming Service (encoder)" as ss
package "Transfer Service" as ts
package "Control Domain (win10/linux)" as cd
package "Media (mediaID)" as media

cd -> ss : host(sources{endpoints})
cd -> ss : host(mediaID, consumers{token, priority})

apps -> sg : authenticate(ID)
sg --> apps : return(token)

cams -> cd : register(endpoint)
apps -> cd : register(token, priority)

cd -> cd : create(newEvent)
cd -> ss : encode()
cd -> media : saveAs(mediaID)
media --> cd : save(mediaID)

cd -> apps : notify(recording)
cd -> apps : notify(newMediaAvailable, mediaID, transferServiceEndpoint)

cd -> apps : fetchMedia(token, mediaID)
apps --> cd : returnByPriority(mediaStream)

cd -> apps : showMedia(token)
apps --> cd : fetchMedia(token, mediaID)
cd --> apps : returnByPriority(mediaStream)

cd -> rs : start(newEvent)
cd -> rs : stop(newEvent)

alt [auto-download enabled]
  cd -> apps : fetchMedia(token, mediaID)
  apps --> cd : returnByPriority(mediaStream)
else [manual-download enabled]
  apps -> cd : showMedia(token)
  cd -> apps : fetchMedia(token, mediaID)
  cd --> apps : returnByPriority(mediaStream)
end

@enduml
